category_sources: Official TextTest site describes tools for executing and developing test cases.
source_facts.description says TextTest is a tool for text-based Approval Testing.
display_name_sources: source_facts.homepage points to the official TextTest site, which uses the display name TextTest.
docs_sources: Official TextTest site contains current getting-started documentation and says full documentation is currently hosted on the SourceForge URL.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official TextTest about page says TextTest is open source software hosted on GitHub.
tags_sources: Official TextTest documentation describes command-line tools and development tools for creating, running, and updating test cases.
